description: Live 4-column build pipeline monitor — feeder queue, runner status, active tasks, completed results.
Visual diagramming and design — palette sidebar, canvas editor, IR generation terminal, properties sidebar. Drag components, edit IR, real-time sync.
AI chat interface powered by terminal primitive and terminal service
Browser IDE with Fr@nk AI assistant. Activity Bar, file explorer with git status, editor with tabs and line numbers, Fr@nk terminal. Three Currencies on every session.
Real-time messaging — channels, DMs, presence. Relay-first layout with channel sidebar, chat bubbles, and compose bar.
Feature inventory kanban board with drag-drop, filters, and accordion columns
Live build queue monitor with SSE heartbeat feed from hivenode
Shell playground — test splits, merges, tabs, drag, swap, and pane chrome
Visual BPMN flow designer with DES simulation engine. Design, simulate, playback, tabletop, compare.
Processing (p5.js) canvas with turtle graphics. Draw with commands or natural language via Fr@nk.
